How to continually improve your funnel into an automated sales machine!
Overall objectives
Offer and/or pricing
Add bump and/or upsell
Functionality of page(s)
Order of page(s)
BIG FUNNEL IDEAS:
Hook and/or headlines
Using/optimizing video
Overall design of page
Adding/removing elements
Copy and colors on page
OPTIMIZATION ITEMS:
Add email/text follow-up
Use popups (various types)
Add a countdown timer
Live chat support widget
Social proof widget
POTENTIAL ADDITIONS:
A/B split test important pages
Customize for specific audiences
Improve automated follow-up
OVERALL STRATEGY:
FUNNEL OPTIMIZATION CHECKLIST
Optimization is never done… keep going!
